title: MoreJS: KubeJS Addon
description: A Minecraft mod to extend KubeJS with additional events.
body:
## **⚙️MoreJS** A Minecraft mod to extend [KubeJS] with additional events. [Discord] ## **📑 Overview** This is a mod for [Minecraft]-[Forge] and [Fabric] and needs [KubeJS].
An overview of a few events: | Events | Client Script | Server Script | | -------------------------------- | :-----------: | :-----------: | | morejs.villager.trades | | ✔️ | | morejs.wanderer.trades | | ✔️ | | morejs.player.start_trading | | ✔️ | | morejs.enchantment_table.changed | | ✔️ | | morejs.enchantment_table.enchant | | ✔️ | | morejs.enchantment_table.tooltip | ✔️ | | | morejs.teleport | | ✔️ | | morejs.structure.load | | ✔️ | | morejs.player.xp_change | | ✔️ | [discord]: https://discord.com/invite/ThFnwZCyYY [kubejs]: https://kubejs.com/
